title: Creeper Pack
description: A Vanilla+, Well Optimized Modpack that mainly expands on features already in the game. If your starting to get bored by normal Minecraft this is the pack for you.
body:
Creeper Pack
---------------------------------------------------------------------------

The Creeper Pack adds Lots of vannila+ Features and expand on almost every part of the Minecraft.
List.
The Modpack has a lot of focus on Optimising the game so the small minority that dont have a Nasa Computer also can play it.


To Report Any Bugs Or Give any Suggestions Message Me on Discord *(creeperban)*

Planned Features
-------------------------------------
**Naturalist** (Waiting for 1.20 Update)

**Create** Waiting for it to be compatible with Sodium 0.5.0


If your playing on a server and dont understand how to set up Proximty Chat here is a little tutorial

<details>
<summary>Set up Proximity Chat</summary>

1. Go to the config folder

2. Go to the voicechat folder (if its not there start up the server and try again)

3. You should see a file named voicechat-server.properties but if thats not there just press one called voice chat 

4. in the config your now in you will see this **Port=24454**

5. Then change that to **Port=-1**

**IF THIS WONT WORK DM ME ON DISCORD** *creeperban* is my username
